revision.comment: Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:20世紀日本の人物 (職業別)]] [[ar:Category:أشخاص يابانيون في القرن 20 حسب المهنة]] [[azb:Category:ایشلرینه گؤره ۲۰. یوز ایلده ژاپونلو کیمسه‌لر]] [[cs:Category:Japonci 20. století podle povolání]] [[cy:Category:Pobl yr 20fed ganrif o Japan yn ôl galwedigaeth]] [[fa:Category:اهالی ژاپن در سده ۲۰ (میلادی) بر پایه پیشه]] [[hy:Category:20-րդ դարի ճապոնացիներ ըստ մասնագիտության]] [[tr:Category:Uğraşına göre 20. yüzyıl Japonları]] [[vi:Category:Người Nhật thế kỷ 20 theo nghề nghiệp]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:20世紀日本の皇族]].

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
